title: × amelasorbus jackii
intro: × Amelasorbus jackii is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Amelanchier and Sorbus, known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its roots, which contain tannins and flavonoids with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with × Amelasorbus jackii include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate cough, and soothe digestive issues, due to its soothing and antiseptic effects. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
